content.body: I think an update is still useful, based on activity in the proposal repo it looks like it's been five years or so since it's been discussed.
The video link for the plenary meeting is now available via [the sign in form.](https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/573)
content.formatted_body: The video link for the plenary meeting is now available via the sign in form.
